# PraisonAIBio

Open-source PraisonAI extension for BioModels.org systems biology (v0.2.0).

## Install
pip install praisonai-bio
pip install -e "src/praisonai-bio[simulation,plot,rag,dev]"

## Import
import praisonai_bio  # registers 28 tools + wire_bio_hooks()

## Docs
https://bio.praison.ai

## Toolsets
biomodels-readonly, sbml_analysis, sysbio-core, simulation, reporting, sysbio-full, sysbio-orchestrator, repro, sysbio-safe, genomics-bridge, sysbio-orchestrator-scheduled

## T2B parity tools (11)
search_models, get_modelinfo, load_biomodel, simulate_model, ask_question, steady_state, parameter_scan, custom_plotter, get_annotation, query_article, save_model

## Discovery / API tools (17)
rank_models, trust_scorecard, compare_models, preview_outcomes, sbml_summarise, sbml_validate, sbml_to_graph, sedml_parse, sedml_simulate, simulate_perturbation, compare_simulations, repro_export, list_model_files, download_model_file, advanced_search, search_parameters, get_reaction_graph

## Workflows
praisonai workflow run workflows/cookbooks/full_platform_pipeline.yaml
praisonai workflow run workflows/lifecycle/scientist_full_pipeline.yaml
praisonai workflow run workflows/cookbooks/t2b_il6_precision_medicine.yaml
praisonai workflow run workflows/cookbooks/t2b_mapk_hysteresis.yaml
praisonai workflow run workflows/cookbooks/t2b_covid_epidemiology.yaml

## Recipes
export PRAISONAI_RECIPE_PATH=recipes/bio
praisonai recipe run biomodels-discovery --policy bio-public
praisonai recipe run biomodels-research --policy bio-lab
praisonai recipe run biomodels-simulate
praisonai recipe run biomodels-perturb
praisonai recipe run biomodels-report

## Policy
PRAISONAI_POLICY_PACK=bio-public|bio-lab
PRAISONAI_REQUIRE_APPROVAL=1  # enforce HITL for parameter_scan / simulate_perturbation
BIOMODELS_RUN_ID=run-123  # JSONL trace under ~/.praisonai/biomodels-runs/

## MCP
praisonai-bio-mcp  # sysbio-full toolset (28 tools)

## Skills
skills/catalog.json — 16 skills; bridge via PRAISONAI_SKILLS_PATH=skills

## Notebooks
examples/notebooks/01_search_rank.ipynb … 05_repro_bundle.ipynb
python scripts/notebook_to_repro.py examples/notebooks/05_repro_bundle.ipynb

## Agent presets
from praisonai_bio.config.presets import DISCOVERY_AGENT, SIMULATION_AGENT, ORCHESTRATOR_AGENT

## Demo model
BIOMD0000000206 (Teusink yeast glycolysis)

## Benchmarks
python benchmarks/run_all.py
python benchmarks/t2b_parity/eval_suite_runner.py
benchmarks/moy2024/manifest.json

## AgentTeam example
python examples/python/team_model_review.py

## Compare
vs Talk2BioModels: docs/concepts/vs-t2b.md
vs ClawBio (complementary): docs/concepts/vs-clawbio.md
